info.title: Astraflow Platform API
info.description: Public platform API contract for Astraflow workspace resources. The web app currently backs some of these surfaces with Server Actions; this specification documents the external REST contract exposed in product documentation.

tags.name: Agents
tags.description: Agent definitions, versions, YAML, skills, and tool configuration.

tags.name: Environments
tags.description: Sandbox environments and environment-level MCP attachments.

tags.name: Sessions
tags.description: Interactive agent sessions, timeline events, approvals, and cancellation.

tags.name: Files
tags.description: Workspace file uploads, downloads, and deletions.

tags.name: Skills
tags.description: Custom skill definitions and attached resource files.

tags.name: Memory Stores
tags.description: Vector memory stores and ingestion jobs.

tags.name: Credentials
tags.description: Encrypted workspace secrets referenced by environments and MCP headers.

tags.name: Deployments
tags.description: Manual, scheduled, and webhook deployment runs.

tags.name: Workspace Settings
tags.description: Workspace profile, members, limits, and billing surfaces.

get.description: Returns the workspace model catalog. Current production routes all listed models through ModelVerse with per-million-token pricing metadata.

post.description: Creates an agent and its first version. The body mirrors the Create Agent surface, including model, runtime, tools, MCP servers, skills, and metadata.

200.description: Server-sent event stream of session timeline events.

post.summary: Approve or reject a tool call

bearerAuth.description: Use a workspace API key in the Authorization header.

Limit.name: limit
Limit.description: Maximum number of resources to return.

Cursor.name: cursor
Cursor.description: Pagination cursor from the previous response.

Forbidden.description: The API key does not have access to this resource.
